cpu_memory_data.details: metrics.currentStats tRPC endpoint returns 404 NOT_FOUND. Node table CPU% and Mem% columns show '—' dashes. Pod table CPU and Memory columns also show '—'. Header widget shows 0% CPU (no real data). Bug NOT FIXED.

favicon_svg.details: favicon.svg still returns HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. Console error confirmed: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500'. Bug NOT FIXED.

health_nav_link.details: Clicking Health nav link navigates to /system-health which serves raw API JSON {"status":"ok"} instead of the frontend SPA page. The route is not handled by the frontend router — backend intercepts it. Bug NOT FIXED.

settings_token_list.details: Settings page loads correctly. API Tokens section shows 15 tokens (10 per page, 2 pages), with pagination controls. Generate Token and Revoke actions visible. No regressions detected.

summary: 3 out of 4 focus bugs remain unfixed in v169. Only Settings Token List passes. CPU/Memory data, favicon.svg (500), and Health nav link (raw API JSON) are all still broken.
